'''karocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycodiversity|mycodiversity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycodiversity|mycodiversity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| karocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kærecheth|kærecheth]] || [[word:kærechej|kærechej]] || [[word:kærechesh|kærechesh]] || [[word:kæreche|kæreche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:karorochoth|karorochoth]] || [[word:karorochoj|karorochoj]] || [[word:karorochosh|karorochosh]] || [[word:karorocho|karorocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:karochoth|karochoth]] || [[word:karochoj|karochoj]] || [[word:karochosh|karochosh]] || [[word:karocho|karocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:karofchoth|karofchoth]] || [[word:karofchoj|karofchoj]] || [[word:karofchosh|karofchosh]] || [[word:karofchof|karofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:karochotho|karochotho]] || [[word:karochojo|karochojo]] || [[word:karochosho|karochosho]] || [[word:karochoko|karochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:karochoth|karochoth]] || [[word:karochoj|karochoj]] || [[word:karochosh|karochosh]] || [[word:karocho|karocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:karochothol|karochothol]] || [[word:karochojol|karochojol]] || [[word:karochoshol|karochoshol]] || [[word:karochokol|karochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:karochothotho|karochothotho]] || [[word:karochojojo|karochojojo]] || [[word:karochoshosho|karochoshosho]] || [[word:karochoko|karochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:karochothon|karochothon]] || [[word:karochojon|karochojon]] || [[word:karochoshon|karochoshon]] || [[word:karochokon|karochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:karochothoro|karochothoro]] || [[word:karochojoro|karochojoro]] || [[word:karochoshoro|karochoshoro]] || [[word:karochokoro|karochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
